refnamediv.refpurpose: Checks if a geometry has a Z dimension.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Checks if the input geometry has a Z dimension and returns a boolean value. If the geometry has a Z dimension, it returns true; otherwise, it returns false.
Geometry objects with a Z dimension typically represent three-dimensional (3D) geometries, while those without it are two-dimensional (2D) geometries.
This function is useful for determining if a geometry has elevation or height information.
